description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake that triggers on push events. Configure a matrix build with separate jobs for Windows and Linux, each using a different runner and strategy. For Windows, use a windows-2019 runner and build with CMake, targeting x86 and x64 architectures. For Linux, use an ubuntu-20.04 runner and build with CMake, targeting x64-linux, arm64-linux, and arm-linux architectures with specific cross-compilers.
